content: Update backend .env: community wallet, allocation %, dry-run flag, treasury seed placeholder
Add new models: PriceSnapshot, LiquidityExecution, PairTransaction
Build services/liquidity_engine.py — Sunday 20:00 UTC scheduler, 65/35 split, dry-run + real XRPL signing
Build services/whale_detector.py — enhanced classifier with sender balance cache + rank-based thresholds
Build services/ohlc_engine.py — price snapshots + OHLC aggregation by timeframe
Update worker.py to integrate new services; add APScheduler in server.py for Sunday cron
Update /api/stats/subscriptions: add allocation fields. Add /api/liquidity/* endpoints
Update /api/amm/pairs/{id}/chart to use real OHLC with synthetic fallback
Frontend: add allocation breakdown to LiquiditySupportTracker, dest wallet badge, dry-run indicator
Frontend: add LiquidityExecutionLog component showing recent executions
